dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rival expedition out of {location} is after the same {quest_item}. {target_npc} spotted their scouts heading {location_hint} with a full supply train. They've got numbers on their side, but we've got speed. If we don't move fast, they'll strip the place clean before we get there. Oh, and they've hired {enemy_type} mercenaries for protection.
dialogueChunks.outro: We didn't come this far to lose to latecomers. Get in there first and claim what's ours.

playerResponses.text: Then there's no time to waste. I'm moving now.
Competition means this prize is worth even more. I want a bigger share.
I didn't sign up for a race. Count me out.

dialogueChunks.intro: You made it back. Good. Because my intel was wrong and I owe you the truth.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: That location {location_hint}? It's not just guarded: it's a trap. The {enemy_type} aren't nesting there by accident. Someone, or something, is using the {quest_item} as bait to lure in adventurers. {target_npc} found markings near the entrance: deliberate, organized, predatory. We need a new approach. Scout the perimeter, find another way in, and neutralize whatever is coordinating those creatures.
dialogueChunks.outro: I won't blame you if you walk away. But if you're still in, this just became the kind of story people tell for generations.

playerResponses.text: A trap makes it interesting. Let's spring it on our terms.
You almost got me killed with bad intel. Don't let it happen again.
Walking into a known trap is just stupidity. I'm out.

dialogueChunks.intro: Incredible work so far, {player_name}, but listen carefully: the situation has evolved.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What we thought was a simple retrieval has turned into something much bigger. The {quest_item} you found is only a fragment. The complete artifact is in three pieces, and the second piece is held by a {enemy_type} chieftain {location_hint}. {target_npc} deciphered the inscriptions: without all three pieces, what we have is worthless. The chieftain won't part with it willingly.
dialogueChunks.outro: We're in too deep to turn back now. One more piece, and we change the world. Are you ready?

playerResponses.text: One chieftain between us and history? Let's go.
The scope keeps growing. So should my reward.
You keep moving the goalposts. I'm done.
